# Release Checklist

## Code
- [ ] PHP syntax passes
- [ ] WordPress Coding Standards
- [ ] No debug code
- [ ] No TODOs left unintentionally

## Documentation
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] ROADMAP updated
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Architecture docs updated

## Database
- [ ] Migration created
- [ ] Upgrade tested

## UI
- [ ] Desktop tested
- [ ] Tablet tested
- [ ] Mobile tested

## Security
- [ ] Nonces
- [ ] Escaping
- [ ] Sanitising
- [ ] Capability checks

## Git
- [ ] Version tag created
- [ ] Release notes written
